name: merchant_item_oid
description: Unique object identifier for this item

name: merchant_item_id
description: Unique item id assigned to this item

name: description
description: Description of the item up to 500 characters.

name: parent_category_id
description: Parent category of the item.  Zero indicates the root folder.

name: parent_category_path
description: Parent category path.  / indicates the root folder.  This is the folder structure within item management.

name: kit
description: True if this item is a kit

name: inactive
description: True if this item is inactive and can not be purchased

name: kit_component_only
description: True if this item can only be usd as a kit component

fields.name: mix_and_match_group_oid
fields.description: Mix and match group object identifier

fields.name: default_tier
fields.description: True if this is the default tier

fields.name: auto_order_cost
fields.description: Cost if customer selects to receive item on auto order.  Set to zero to delete.

fields.name: ship_separately
fields.description: Ship this item in a separate box

fields.name: country_code_of_origin
fields.description: Country code of origin for customs forms.  (ISO-3166 two letter code)

fields.name: require_delivery_date
fields.description: True to require customer to select a delivery date

fields.name: made_to_order
fields.description: True if this item is made to order

fields.name: made_to_order_lead_time
fields.description: Number of days lead time it takes to make the item before ite can ship

fields.name: filter_to_if_available
fields.description: Filter to this method if available

fields.name: handles
fields.description: True if this distribution center handles this item

fields.name: cogs
fields.description: Cost of goods sold override at the distribution center level

fields.name: adult_signature_required
fields.description: Adult Signature Required (only updated if not-null value provided)

fields.name: include_on_packing_slip
fields.description: Force this item onto the packing slip even if there is no weight.

fields.name: send_to_hold_before_fulfillment
fields.description: Send order to hold stage before fulfillment

fields.name: terms_if_auto_order
fields.description: Terms only apply if the item is on auto order

fields.name: auto_orderable
fields.description: True if this item can be automatically ordered by the customer

fields.name: auto_order_schedules
fields.description: The user selectable schedules that are available

fields.name: auto_order_upsell
fields.description: True if this item uses a fixed upsell step schedule

fields.name: auto_order_upsell_one_per_customer
fields.description: Limit the purchase of this item to one per customer

fields.name: auto_order_upsell_no_easy_cancel
fields.description: Do not send the easy cancel email to the customer

fields.name: auto_order_upgrade_items
fields.description: List of upgrade items presented to customer service representatives

fields.name: auto_order_downgrade_items
fields.description: List of downgrade items presented to customer service representatives

fields.name: auth_test_amount
fields.description: Amount to try and test authorize

fields.name: auth_future_amount
fields.description: Amount to try and authorize for the future rebill

fields.name: cancel_other_auto_orders
fields.description: True if other auto orders for this customer should be canceled when this item is ordered

fields.name: auto_order_cancel_item_oid
fields.description: Item object identifier to attempt charging the customer for if they cancel

fields.name: auto_order_cancel_item_id
fields.description: Item id to attempt charging the customer for if they cancel

fields.name: auto_order_cancel_minimum_rebill_value
fields.description: The minimum rebill value that must be paid in order to not be charged the cancellation item.

fields.name: auto_order_cancel_minimum_life_time_value
fields.description: The minimum life time value that must be paid in order to not be charged the cancellation item.

fields.name: auto_order_cancel_charge_minimum_balance
fields.description: If true, the cost of the cancel item will be the remaining balance of the minimum rebill or lifetime value

fields.name: auto_order_paused
fields.description: True if the rebill processing of this item is paused

fields.name: free_shipping_auto_order
fields.description: True if the customer should be given free shipping

fields.name: steps
fields.description: The rebill steps if this auto order is an upsell

fields.name: type
fields.description: Type of step (item, kit only, loop or pause)

fields.name: repeat_count
fields.description: Number of times to rebill.  Last step can be null for infinite

fields.name: arbitrary_unit_cost
fields.description: Arbitrary unit cost used to override the regular item cost

fields.name: subscribe_email_list_oid
fields.description: Email list identifier to subscribe the customer to when this rebill occurs (decommissioned email engine)

fields.name: subscribe_email_list_name
fields.description: Email list name to subscribe the customer to when the rebill occurs (decommissioned email engine)

fields.name: arbitrary_schedule_days
fields.description: If the schedule is arbitrary, then this is the number of days

fields.name: preshipment_notice_days
fields.description: If set, a pre-shipment notice is sent to the customer this many days in advance

fields.name: grandfather_pricing
fields.description: Grand-father pricing configuration if the rebill schedule has changed over time

fields.name: pause_until_date
fields.description: Wait for this step to happen until the specified date

fields.name: arbitrary_unit_cost_schedules
fields.description: Arbitrary unit costs schedules for more advanced discounting by rebill attempt

fields.name: pause_until_day_of_month
fields.description: Pause until a specific day of the month

fields.name: pause_until_minimum_delay_days
fields.description: Pause at least this many days between the last order and the calculated next day of month

fields.name: refund_other_auto_orders
fields.description: True if other auto orders for this customer should refunded if this item is refunded.

fields.name: auto_order_prohibit_expiring_cards
fields.description: Minimum number of months before expiration for the card.  Overrides the account level setting if higher.  Set to zero to disable.

fields.name: auto_order_cancel_minimum_rebill_count
fields.description: The minimum rebill count that must be billed in order to not be charged the cancellation item.

fields.name: auto_order_cancel_minimum_life_time_count
fields.description: The minimum life time count that must be billed in order to not be charged the cancellation item.

name: identifiers
description: Identifiers such as SKU, Barcode, etc.

fields.name: taxable_cost
fields.description: Taxable cost if different than regular cost

fields.name: qb_class
fields.description: QuickBooks class if you are classifying items on your invoices/receipts

fields.name: accounting_code
fields.description: QuickBooks item name if different than the item id

fields.name: gift_certificate
fields.description: True if the purchase of this item generates a gift certificate

fields.name: gift_certificate_expiration_days
fields.description: The number of days that the gift certificate is good for (optional)

fields.name: amember_product_id
fields.description: A-member product id give customer access to when they purchase this item

fields.name: amember_payment_duration_days
fields.description: The number of days that the customer should be given access to the item

fields.name: digital_items
fields.description: Digital items that customer can download when this item is purchased

fields.name: digital_item_oid
fields.description: The Digital item oid is a primary key used internally by UltraCart.  You should not set or change this value.  Doing so will have no effect.

fields.name: mime_type
fields.description: Mime type associated with the file

fields.name: import_from_url
fields.description: This url is sourced to create or update a digital file in your digital library.  It is only considered during an insert or update operation.

fields.name: click_wrap_agreement
fields.description: Click wrap agreement is presented to the customer before they can purchase your product.

fields.name: custom_header
fields.description: A custom header for each pdf page

fields.name: custom_footer
fields.description: A custom footer for each pdf page

fields.name: external_id
fields.description: External Id useful for syncing with a remote filesystem, this may be an MD5 hash or whatever suits your needs.

fields.name: activation_code_low_warning
fields.description: The number of activation codes whcih should generate a warning email

fields.name: activation_code_realtime_url
fields.description: The URL to retrieve activation codes from in real-time

fields.name: block_prepaid
fields.description: True if prepaid cards should be blocked from buying this item

fields.name: block_refunds
fields.description: True if this item should block any refund attempts, set to false otherwise, null value will not update the field

fields.name: no_realtime_charge
fields.description: True if no real-time charge should be performed on this item.

fields.name: has_review
fields.description: True if the item has a review

fields.name: has_approved_review
fields.description: True if the item has an approved review

fields.name: reviewable
fields.description: True if the item is reviewable

fields.name: share_reviews_with_merchant_item_oid
fields.description: Share reviews with item oid.  To null out this field, set teh value to zero.

fields.name: share_reviews_with_merchant_item_id
fields.description: Share reviews with item id.  To set, use the share_reviews_with_merchant_item_oid field.

fields.name: merchant_reply
fields.description: Merchant Reply (set to an empty string to remove)

name: physical
description: Physical characters like weight and measurements

fields.name: no_system_calculated_related_items
fields.description: True to suppress system calculated relationships

fields.name: exclude_from_loyalty
fields.description: Exclude from loyalty.  Must be set to true or false to save.  Null is ignored for backwards SDK compatibility

fields.name: post_operation
fields.description: True for HTTP POST instead of GET

name: content
description: Content such as multimedia and attributes

fields.name: exclude_from_top_sellers
fields.description: Exclude from the top sellers list in the StoreFront

fields.name: view_url
fields.description: Legacy view URL (not used by StoreFronts)

fields.name: new_item
fields.description: True if the item is new

fields.name: new_item_start
fields.description: The date the item should start being considered new

fields.name: new_item_end
fields.description: The date the item should no longer be considered new

fields.name: extended_description_translated_text_instance_oid
fields.description: Extended description text translation instance identifier

fields.name: url_part
fields.description: URL part if the item id is not used

fields.name: default_assignment
fields.description: True if this group is the default assignment for this item

fields.name: url
fields.description: URL to download file (on new multimedia record this can be a URL for UltraCart to fetch)

fields.name: exclude_from_gallery
fields.description: True to exclude from multimedia gallery

fields.name: temp_multimedia_oid
fields.description: Temporary multimedia object identifier assigned if uploading new multimedia

fields.name: orphan
fields.description: True if the multimedia is an orphan of the active StoreFront themes

fields.name: placeholder
fields.description: True if the object is a place holder that can be populated

fields.name: cloud_url
fields.description: URL where the image can be downloaded from the cloud

fields.name: cloud_url_expiration
fields.description: Expiration date of the cloud URL

fields.name: http_url
fields.description: HTTP URL to view the thumbnail

fields.name: https_url
fields.description: HTTPS URL to view the thumbnail

fields.name: png_format
fields.description: True if PNG, false if JPEG

fields.name: square
fields.description: True if the thumbnail is square

fields.name: size
fields.description: Size of the file in bytes if known

fields.name: exclude_from_sitemap
fields.description: Exclude from the sitemap for the StoreFront

fields.name: meta_title
fields.description: SEO meta title used by Storefronts

fields.name: meta_description
fields.description: SEO meta description used by Storefronts

fields.name: meta_keywords
fields.description: SEO meta keywords used by Storefronts

fields.name: system_option
fields.description: True if this is a system option

fields.name: required
fields.description: True if the customer is required to specify an answer

fields.name: ignore_if_default
fields.description: Ignore this option on the order if the default value is selected

fields.name: additional_items
fields.description: Additional items to add to the order if this value is selected

fields.name: digital_items
fields.description: Digital items to allow the customer to download if this option value is selected

fields.name: merchant_item_multimedia_oid
fields.description: Multimedia object identifier associated with this option value

fields.name: default_text_translated_text_instance_oid
fields.description: Default text translated text instance id

fields.name: ebay_auction_id
fields.description: If listed, this is the e-Bay auction id

fields.name: active
fields.description: True if the item is active for listing

fields.name: listing_price
fields.description: Price to list the item at

fields.name: free_shipping
fields.description: True if item receives free shipping

fields.name: last_status_dts
fields.description: Date/time of the last status check

fields.name: free_shipping_method
fields.description: The method that is free for free shipping

fields.name: ebay_template_oid
fields.description: The template object identifier to use when rendering the e-Bay listing

fields.name: ebay_template_name
fields.description: The template name to use hwen rendering the e-Bay listing

fields.name: listed_ebay_template_oid
fields.description: The template object identifier used for the listing

fields.name: no_promotional_shipping
fields.description: True if the item should not qualify for promotional shipping

fields.name: listing_price_override
fields.description: The price to list the item at if different than the regular UltraCart item price

fields.name: send_dimensions_and_weight
fields.description: How to send the item dimensions and weights to e-Bay

fields.name: consecutive_failures
fields.description: Number of consecutive failures trying to list this item

fields.name: next_attempt_dts
fields.description: Date/time for the next attempt to list

fields.name: dispatch_time_max
fields.description: Maximum number of days it will take to ship the item

fields.name: target_dispatch_time_max
fields.description: Typical number of days it will take to ship the item

fields.name: marketplace_analysis_perform
fields.description: True if marketplace analysis should be performed

fields.name: marketplace_last_check_dts
fields.description: Date/time of the marketplace analysis last check

fields.name: marketplace_profitable
fields.description: True if our listing is profitable to sell

fields.name: marketplace_lowest
fields.description: True if we are the lowest offer in the marketplace

fields.name: marketplace_map_violation
fields.description: True if another seller is violating MAP

fields.name: next_listing_duration
fields.description: The next listing duration to use when the current listing ends.

fields.name: condition_id
fields.description: Numerical ID of the condition (e-Bay constant)

fields.name: name
fields.description: Name of the category specification field

fields.name: cost
fields.description: Cost given to this channel partner

name: recommend_replenishment_days
description: Number of days to recommend replenishment after.  Null is not configured.  Set to zero to disable.
